texto: Things are not as easily understood nor as expressible as people usually would like us to believe. Most happenings are beyond expression
autor: they exist where a word has never intruded.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a they exist where a word has never intruded.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Things are not as easily understood nor as expressible as people usually would like us to believe…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, rainer-maria-rilke, letters-to-a-young-poet pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e letters-to-a-young-poet.
